name: Celery Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the celery, carrots, and apples.
2. Thoroughly blend together the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Fold the blended mixture into the celery combination.
4. If desired, fold in the walnuts or sprinkle over top as a garnish.
5. Chill for at least 30 minutes before serving in a lettuce-lined bowl.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/4 FRUIT EXCHANGE (IF YOU USED THE BIGGEST APPLE EVER). I would adjust this recipe to make it 1 fat exchange for me and use sugar substitute. Could be used as a side dish for the vegetarian.
